bard_finn_oakheart:idle.greeting: Finn tunes the lute, eyes closed. "Walker. The tavern is loud tonight, but I've got an hour. Sit."

nodes.npcText: "Three things I sing: history, satire, lament. Want a song or a story?"

playerOptions.text: I heard a hub bard sings the same song different.

nodes.npcText: "Jora Kell. We met once. The Concordia ballad — we sing different verses. The lattice carries them between us."

playerOptions.text: Could I carry one for you?

nodes.npcText: "For you? Free. The Lattice Lullaby, slow tempo."
He nods, plays a chord, looks away. The conversation is over.

hunter_old_brann:idle.greeting: Brann does not look up from the print he's examining. "Quiet. Make it three sentences or fewer."

playerOptions.text: Kiren Owl tracks the same print in the hub.

nodes.npcText: "Yes. Bring me his sketch. I'll match it against mine. Twenty years of these."
He goes back to the print.
